sourceTitle: Acknowledging the use of AI - Student Academic Success
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Whenever you are allowed or required to use AI in an assessment, you must also: Follow all instructions and restrictions on its use; Clearly document the type of AI used and how it contributed to the assessment; Provide written acknowledgment of the use of AI and its extent; and When necessary, cite and reference using the closest source types in the style being used.
evidenceLocator: Acknowledging the use of AI page, main content section
